recommendations.title: Girlfight
recommendations.overview: Diana Guzman, a troubled Brooklyn teenager, decides to channel her aggression by training to become a boxer, all while keeping it a secret from her father.

recommendations.title: The Invitation

recommendations.title: Jennifer's Body
recommendations.overview: Jennifer, a gorgeous, seductive cheerleader takes evil to a whole new level after she's possessed by a sinister demon. Now it's up to her best friend to stop Jennifer's reign of terror before it's too late.

recommendations.title: Destroyer
recommendations.overview: When Erin Bell was a young cop, she was given an undercover assignment that ended badly and destroyed her life. Years later, she must face her demons in order to make peace with her past.

recommendations.title: Æon Flux
recommendations.overview: 400 years into the future, disease has wiped out the majority of the world's population, except one walled city, Bregna, ruled by a congress of scientists. When Æon Flux, the top operative in the underground 'Monican' rebellion, is sent on a mission

recommendations.title: (Girl)Friend
recommendations.overview: Vincent and Nefeli just moved in together. They're best friends and swore to never fall in love again. That is until Vincent meets Julie.

recommendations.title: Vincent
recommendations.overview: Young Vincent Malloy dreams of being just like Vincent Price and loses himself in macabre daydreams that annoy his mother.

recommendations.title: The Color of Money
recommendations.overview: Former pool hustler "Fast Eddie" Felson decides he wants to return to the game by taking a pupil. He meets talented but green Vincent Lauria and proposes a partnership. As they tour pool halls, Eddie teaches Vincent the tricks of scamming, but he eve

recommendations.title: Loving Vincent
recommendations.overview: A young man arrives at the last hometown of painter Vincent van Gogh to deliver the troubled artist's final letter and ends up investigating his final days there.

recommendations.title: The Nightshifter
recommendations.overview: Stênio, the nightshifter of a morgue, has the ability to communicate with the cadavers that are brought to him every night.
